metadata.title: Billix — AI Workspace for Chat, Automation & Integrations
metadata.description: Billix unifies AI chat, automation, content creation, and 500+ integrations in one seamless workspace. Give plain-language instructions and let Billix execute real actions instantly — no setup, no tech skills required.

footer.description: Billix unifies AI chat, automation, content creation, and 500+ integrations in one seamless workspace. Give plain-language instructions and let Billix execute real actions instantly—no setup, no tech skills required.

faqs.description: Find quick, helpful explanations about features, pricing, integrations, and how Billix fits into your workflow.

items.title: What is Billix?
content: Billix is an AI-powered workspace that unifies chat, automation, content creation, and 500+ integrations into one seamless platform.
Just give plain-language instructions and Billix executes real actions across your connected apps — no setup or technical skills required.

items.title: How does Billix differ from other AI tools?
content: Unlike traditional AI chatbots that only generate text, Billix actually performs actions across your apps — sending emails, updating spreadsheets, managing tasks, and more.
There are no flow builders, triggers, or complex logic to configure. Just describe what you need in natural language.

items.title: What integrations does Billix support?
content: Billix connects with 500+ apps including Gmail, Slack, Notion, HubSpot, Google Sheets, Salesforce, Stripe, GitHub, Dropbox, Airtable, LinkedIn, and many more.
If an app has an API, Billix can connect to it and execute actions on your behalf.

items.title: Is there a free trial available?
content: Yes! You can get started with Billix and explore the platform's core capabilities before committing to a paid plan.
Visit our pricing page to see all available plans and choose the one that fits your needs.

items.title: Is my data secure with Billix?
content: Absolutely. We use industry-standard encryption, secure infrastructure, and strict access controls to protect your data at every level.
Read our security policy for full details on how we safeguard your information.

items.title: Can I use Billix with my team?
content: Yes! Billix supports team collaboration with shared workspaces, role-based access, and enterprise-grade features for organizations of any size.
Check out our Enterprise plan for advanced team capabilities and dedicated support.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies notice
cookieConsent.cookiesDescription: By continuing to browse this website, you agree to the use of analytical cookies. These cookies help us collect anonymous statistics about site usage so we can improve performance and user experience.
cookieConsent.privacyDescription: Learn how we use cookies in our <link>privacy policy</link>
